prose:
The frontier orbital analysis of furan was performed using DFT at the tier 'standard' (B3LYP functional, def2-TZVP basis set) in the gas phase, as requested. The calculation was performed on the provided geometry. The SCF calculation converged in 9 cycles.

The results are as follows:
- HOMO energy: -6.3598 eV
- LUMO energy: -0.1024 eV
- HOMO-LUMO gap: 6.2574 eV

The calculation was performed with the PySCF program. The molecule was treated as a neutral species with a singlet multiplicity (charge 0, multiplicity 1). No warnings were reported by the tool.
